review_criteria: Verify that git diff / git show HEAD strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify that implementation changes are STRICTLY limited to 'src/mcp-server/src/index.ts'.
Verify that artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
Verify that 'get_execution_diff' and 'get_dispatch_state' tools are purely read-only (using fs.readFile and git diff without side effects).
Verify that there is NO workflow mutation, auto approval logic, or reviewer identity redesign.
Do NOT reject based on updates to tasks/*.json, as these are naturally exempt workflow metadata.
